languages.text: "Ювенна благоволит Изимонду, и в этом нет ничего дурного. Но готовить бумаги втайне от меня и от отца... Не по душе мне это".

traits.locale_text: "Ювенна благоволит Изимонду, и в этом нет ничего дурного. Но готовить бумаги втайне от меня и от отца... Не по душе мне это".

languages.text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."
languages.original_text: "Ювенна благоволит Изимонду, и в этом нет ничего дурного. Но готовить бумаги втайне от меня и от отца... Не по душе мне это".

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."
"Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."
"Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

languages.text: "Juvenna zieht Isimond vor, daran ist nichts falsch. Aber ohne mein und Vaters Wissen solche Dokumente vorzubereiten ... Das gefällt mir ganz und gar nicht."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna zieht Isimond vor, daran ist nichts falsch. Aber ohne mein und Vaters Wissen solche Dokumente vorzubereiten ... Das gefällt mir ganz und gar nicht."

languages.text: “尤文娜偏袒伊西蒙德，这本身没什么问题。但她居然背着父亲和我搞出这种文书来……我不喜欢这样。”
languages.original_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜偏袒伊西蒙德，这本身没什么问题。但她居然背着父亲和我搞出这种文书来……我不喜欢这样。”

languages.text: « Isimond a la faveur de Juvenna, et il n'y a rien de mal à ça. Mais rédiger un tel document sans que mon père ou moi-même n'en ayons connaissance ? Ça ne me plaît pas du tout. »
languages.original_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

traits.locale_text: « Isimond a la faveur de Juvenna, et il n'y a rien de mal à ça. Mais rédiger un tel document sans que mon père ou moi-même n'en ayons connaissance ? Ça ne me plaît pas du tout. »

languages.text: «Juvenna favorece a Isimond, y eso no tiene nada de malo. Pero redactar un documento semejante sin que Padre y yo estuviéramos al corriente... No me hace ninguna gracia».
languages.original_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

traits.locale_text: «Juvenna favorece a Isimond, y eso no tiene nada de malo. Pero redactar un documento semejante sin que Padre y yo estuviéramos al corriente... No me hace ninguna gracia».

languages.text: "Juvenna, İsimond'u kayırıyor ve bunda yanlış bir şey yok. Fakat benim ve babamın haberi olmadan böyle belgeler hazırlamak... Bu hiç hoşuma gitmedi."
languages.original_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna, İsimond'u kayırıyor ve bunda yanlış bir şey yok. Fakat benim ve babamın haberi olmadan böyle belgeler hazırlamak... Bu hiç hoşuma gitmedi."

languages.text: ジュベナはイシモンドを好む、それは構わない。しかし、父も私も知らないで、このような書類を用意するとは... 私はとても気に入らない。
languages.original_text: "Juvenna favours Isimond, and there's nothing wrong with that. But to prepare such documents unbeknownst to me and Father... I do not like it at all."

traits.locale_text: ジュベナはイシモンドを好む、それは構わない。しかし、父も私も知らないで、このような書類を用意するとは... 私はとても気に入らない。
